name: CartDrawer
usage_hint: Slide-in cart drawer that displays added items, quantities, and subtotal with checkout link. Opens automatically on cart:open events. Must be present on all commerce pages.
when_to_use: Include on EVERY page where any cart-capable island exists (BuyBox, StickyBar, QuickAdd, ProductCard). Provides cart confirmation, line item management (update qty, remove), and checkout navigation.
when_not_to_use: Never omit CartDrawer if you have add-to-cart functionality. Skipping it leaves users with no cart feedback or access to their cart.
combine_with: BundleBuilder (all cart-capable islands require CartDrawer for feedback)
anti_patterns: Missing CartDrawer: users can add items but never see cart confirmation or access the cart
Multiple CartDrawer instances: creates state conflicts; only mount CartDrawer once per page
Setting animate:false globally: removes slide-in/exit animations, jarring UX
Hardcoding checkoutUrl without merchant context: use checkoutUrl from cart manager or default /checkout

examples.label: Cart drawer without clear cart button
